chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 186 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6096/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6097/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6098/2025 (R/Surety) 29.10.2025 None present for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant Ali Akber Buriro seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by the available record, it seems that Sikandar Hayat Buriro, who on 29.03.2024, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an special savings certificate amounting to Rs.50,000/-, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from letter dated 08.04.2024, issued by the office of the learned trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
